name: KUKJEON PHARMACEUTICAL Co.,Ltd
summary: As of December 15, 2020, Daishin Balance No.6 Special Purpose Acquisition Co., Ltd. was acquired by Kukjeon Pharm Co., Ltd., in a reverse merger transaction. Daishin Balance No.6 Special Purpose Acquisition Co., Ltd. does not have significant operations. It intends to merge with other companies. The company was founded in 2018 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.
